commands_run_for_crosscheck: sed source inspections of mynn_edmf.py, mynn_pbl.py, tridiagonal_solver.py, physics_couplers.py
conclusion: Wave-B2 MYNN/PBL irreducible disposition is confirmed: the 45.5% wall is dominated by dependent MYNN closure compute; no WRF-faithful, bit-safe mechanical MYNN warmed-step lever above 1% was found.

code_refs: src/gpuwrf/physics/mynn_edmf.py:193 active mask gates output after recurrence, not before per-column work
src/gpuwrf/physics/mynn_edmf.py:263-318 plume_scan carries w/thl/qt/qc/u/v/area/alive through lax.scan over levels
src/gpuwrf/physics/mynn_edmf.py:326-353 vmap over 8 plumes then sums interface fluxes
edmf_mass_flux.reason: Each updraft level depends on the prior plume state (entrainment, condensation, buoyancy, alive/area). Masking inactive columns still leaves SIMT/JAX batched recurrence work; B2 unroll A/B regressed and was not bit-identical.

code_refs: src/gpuwrf/coupling/physics_couplers.py:_to_columns/_from_columns move the vertical axis for column kernels
proofs/v0100/wave_b2_mynn_profile.py HLO op count and component timers
layout_transpose.reason: The measured build/reassemble envelope is small and included in the rejected surface+MYNN fusion A/B. The closure HLO has one transpose and 96 fusions, so there is no independent layout-removal win above the 1% gate.

code_refs: src/gpuwrf/integration/daily_pipeline.py:_surface_diagnostics_for_output old path recomputed surface_layer_diagnostics for Q2 after compute_m9_diagnostics
src/gpuwrf/io/wrfout_writer.py now uses supplied HFX/LH diagnostics before fallback surface solve
redundant_output_recompute.reason: This is not a warmed MYNN/PBL forecast-kernel lever. It is an output-cadence wrapper duplicate and is covered by wave_b3_daily_wrapper_gains/output_parity.

surface_mynn_materialization.reason: Surface+MYNN State round-trip fusion measured 0.09% block gain and was not bit-identical. That does not clear either the >1% or fidelity gate.

vertical_tridiagonal_solves.reason: The faithful primitive is already XLA/lax tridiagonal_solve. Replacing it would be an algorithmic/implementation-risk rewrite, not a mechanical output-equivalent removal.

workload: Wave-B2 STEP 1: MYNN/PBL internal profile (GREEN d02 L2, 66x159x44, fp64, EDMF on)
